# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const verifyAuthToken = (req: NextApiRequest) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.['auth-token'];
  if (!token) {
    return null;
  }

  // Verify the token using a secure token service or library
  const isValid = validateToken(token);
  if (isValid) {
    return token;
  } else {
    return null;
  }
};

const edgeMiddleware = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  const authToken = verifyAuthToken(req);

  // Handle authenticated requests
  if (authToken) {
    req.user = await getUserByAuthToken(authToken);
    next();
  }

  // Handle unauthenticated requests
  else {
    res.setHeader('WWW-Authenticate', 'Basic');
    res.status(401).end();
  }
};

export default edgeMiddleware;
